item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly brakes the requested fourth manual gate, names the prior repeated pattern across Monday through Wednesday plus today, rejects making the sorter confirmation person a standing fix, and moves upstream to shared identity, handoff, exception-release, and system-validation failures. It proposes consolidation via a combined review, temporary-only containment, cause logging, a structural deadline, and a pause on further manual checkpoints."}
